metadata.task: Release or observe the seesaw and determine which side descends. Return 1 if the left side descends, 2 if the right side descends, and 3 if it stays balanced.
metadata.description: The two masses sit at opposite sides of the seesaw pivot. Use observed rotation or vertical position change after stepping the simulation to choose the numeric side code.

expected_behavior: The LLM observes angular motion after releasing the seesaw and identifies the descending side.
reasoning: The right-side mass creates the larger turning effect in this setup, so the numeric side code is 2.
